# anypoint_private_space_routes (Data Source)

Reads the static route table of a private space network (destinations + targets).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Reads the static route table of the private space network (destination + target).
# Targets include "Local", "IGW", "TGW" (with connection metadata), etc.

data "anypoint_private_space_routes" "rt" {
  org_id           = var.root_org
  private_space_id = "7f747999-a9bb-41d5-bfe8-d6b8cca68c62"
}

output "ps_routes" {
  value = data.anypoint_private_space_routes.rt.routes
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_id` (String)
- `private_space_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `routes` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--routes))

<a id="nestedatt--routes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `routes`

Read-Only:

- `destination` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `target` (String)
